top_signals.title: Drupal critical update to fix bug with high exploitation risk
top_signals.summary: Drupal has announced a "core security release" scheduled for later today, warning that threat actors might develop exploits within hours of the update disclosure. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GitHub links repo breach to TanStack npm supply-chain attack
top_signals.summary: GitHub says the hackers who breached 3,800 internal repositories gained access via a malicious version of the Nx Console VS Code extension, compromised in last week's TanStack npm supply-chain attack. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
